svg.title: v1.13 data, target, and EML curves
svg.desc: Twelve v1.13 target panels with target line, training dots, validation triangles, extrapolation squares, and verified EML curves where available. Axes have no numeric tick labels.
svg.text: Axes are deliberately unlabeled numerically. Each panel has its own scale.
Black line: target function. Green dashed line: verified EML curve where the campaign recovered that target.
